_meta.note: Every size on this site is expressed as a fraction of viewport width, where the fraction is (px at a 980px design width) / 980. 1/980 = 0.0010204081632653062. The 'px_at_980' fields below are the resolved design-time pixel values; the 'value' fields are verbatim from the production CSS.

_families._note: te-20 and te-40 are two SEPARATE cuts of the same Univers-derived typeface (files TE20T/TE20L and TE40T/TE40L). te-20 is the small-text cut; te-40 is the large-text cut. This is hand-drawn optical sizing done with two font files instead of a variable `opsz` axis.
_families._display: franxurter (weight 300) and TechnoType (400/500/700) carry the giant poster headline; both load with font-display:block so the poster never flashes a fallback.

_weights._note: These are the ONLY two weights in the interface type system. Nothing in the UI is heavier than Light 300. Body copy defaults to 100.

_line_heights_desktop._note: Every line-height is a multiple of the 10px baseline. Type sits ON the grid; the grid is never adjusted to fit the type.

_font_sizes_mobile._note: Mobile does not reflow — it re-scales. The same tokens are redefined with ~2x fractions so the 980px design stays readable at phone width.

_txt_engine._the_rule: .txt { font-family: var(--te-20); font-weight: 100; font-size: calc((var(--txt-bh-unit) * 2 - var(--txt-px-unit) * 2) * var(--txt-scale)); line-height: calc(var(--txt-bh-unit) * 2 * var(--txt-scale)); letter-spacing: var(--txt-letter-spacing); }
_txt_engine._translation: font-size = (2 baselines − 2px) = 18px. line-height = exactly 2 baselines = 20px. Type is measured in baselines, not in points. Tracking is a constant −0.5px that scales with the page.

layout._grid_check: 12 x 65 + 11 x 10 + 2 x 45 = 980. The grid closes exactly.

radius._note: Everything rectangular is a hard 0. `--round: 9999px` exists only for pill/circle chrome (badges, icon buttons). There is no in-between radius anywhere in the system.

borders._note: Sub-pixel hairlines. Surfaces are separated by rules, not by shadows. There is no elevation system on this site.

motion._note: The entire production CSS contains ONE cubic-bezier. There is no easing system, because there is essentially no motion. The only sanctioned movement is a 12s linear marquee. Treat stillness as a decision, not an omission.
